article.description: — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
article.headline: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz

images.caption: Dyson Daniels stuffs the box score with 16 points, six rebounds, seven assists, two steals and two blocks in the Atlanta Hawks' clutch win over the Utah Jazz.
images.name: Dyson Daniels drops 16 pts, fills stat sheet for Hawks

article.linkText: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
article.story: SALT LAKE CITY -- — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night. Young took an inbounds pass, dribbled to just short of halfcourt and hit the 49-foot winner as time expired while being loosely guarded by Collin Sexton, who had seemingly forced overtime with a tying 3-pointer with four seconds remaining. Young finished with 24 points and 20 assists. Dyson Daniels added 16 points, seven assists, and six rebounds for the Hawks, who snapped a three-game skid. Clint Capela scored 18 points and De’Andre Hunter 17. Lauri Markkanen made a season-high eight 3-pointers and scored a season-best 35 points for Utah. Sexton added 24 points and Walker Kessler finished with 21 points and 10 rebounds. Utah scored on five straight possessions and took a 114-113 lead on back-to-back dunks from Kessler. Young hit a step-back 3-pointer to put Atlanta back in front, and fed De’Andre Hunter for another go-ahead 3 with 1:57 left. Takeaways Hawks: Atlanta used a balanced attack with seven players scoring in double figures. Jazz: Utah fell behind by 14 points in the first quarter and 16 in the second before battling back both times and making it a one-possession game by halftime. Key moment Young’s heave at the buzzer snapped the Hawks' skid and was the team's fifth in its last eight games. Key stat Utah has won just twice in 15 home games. Up next The Hawks finish a six-game road swing at Phoenix on Thursday. The Jazz host Miami on Thursday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.

images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.

videos.description: Dyson Daniels stuffs the box score with 16 points, six rebounds, seven assists, two steals and two blocks in the Atlanta Hawks' clutch win over the Utah Jazz.
videos.headline: Dyson Daniels drops 16 pts, fills stat sheet for Hawks

tracking.trackingName: INET_NBA Highlight (Dyson Daniels drops 16 pts, fills stat sheet for Hawks) 2025/01/08 PACRIM
